title: Image Restoration and Reconstruction Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequential steps and key concepts involved in restoring a degraded image and reconstructing a complete image from partial data.
relationships: Process starts with a Degraded Image as input
The Degradation Model (e.g., blur, motion) is identified or estimated
Noise characteristics (type, level) are modeled and estimated
An appropriate Restoration Algorithm (e.g., Inverse Filter, Wiener Filter, Lucy-Richardson) is applied
Process outputs a Restored Image with reduced degradation and noise
